project_name: SYSTEM SCORING IMAGE SCAN ANSWER SHEET
project_description: Designed an end-to-end Computer Vision system for automatic multiple-choice answer sheet grading. Built and augmented a custom dataset (5640 images) to improve model robustness. Trained YOLOv8 to detect answer bubbles and classify filled/unfilled responses. Achieved 100% accuracy on clean PDF inputs with 67.5 ms/image inference speed. Deployed the system as a Flask-based local web application.

project_name: TRAFFIC SIGN RECOGNITION
project_description: Built a CNN-based image classification system for traffic sign recognition. Performed EDA, handled class imbalance, and applied data preprocessing techniques. Evaluated model performance using Accuracy, Precision, and F1-score. Achieved 90.44% accuracy with 9.07 ms/image inference time. Deployed a Flask web demo for real-time testing.
